name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Common Reconnaissance Commands
notes:
This Building Block detects common reconnaissance commands adversaries execute to gather information about the victim.

Note: The rule may be tuned by the "Process CommandLine" field.
Some common "Process CommandLine" keywords that appear are:
    gpresult /z
    gpresult /v
    gpresult
    nbtstat -n
    net view
    net view /domain
    netstat
    netstat -nab
    netstat -nao
    nslookup 127.0.0.1
    ipconfig /all
    arp -a
    net share
    net use
    systeminfo
    net user
    net user administrator
    net user /domain
    net group
    net group /domain
    net localgroup
    net localgroup
    net localgroup Administrators
    net group "Domain Computers" /domain
    net group "Domain Admins" /domain
    net group "Domain Controllers" /domain
    dir "%programfiles%"
    net group "Exchange Servers" /domain
    net accounts
    net accounts /domain
    net view 127.0.0.1 /all
    net session
    route
    ipconfig /displaydns
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Common Reconnaissance Commands on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(gpresult \/z).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(gpresult \/v).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(gpresult).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(nbtstat -n).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net view).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net config).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net view \/domain).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(netstat).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(netstat -nab).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(netstat -nao).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(nslookup 127.0.0.1).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(ipconfig \/all).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(arp -a).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net share).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net use).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(systeminfo).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(set).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net user).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(tracert).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net user administrator).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net user \/domain).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net group).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net group \/domain).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net localgroup).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net localgroup).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net localgroup administrators).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net group "domain computers" \/domain).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net group "domain admins" \/domain).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net group "domain controllers" \/domain).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(dir \"%programfiles%\").*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net group \"exchange servers\" \/domain).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net accounts).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net accounts \/domain).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net view 127.0.0.1 \/all).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(net session).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(route).*' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(ipconfig \/displaydns).*' AQL filter query
